Patch Set 2:

James, please note that review-dne-zfs-part-{3,4} are optional test sessions that are known to have 100% test failures while we are getting them working.  They do not need to pass in order for the patch to land, so there is no need to resubmit them.  There must be some other test session failure that is keeping the Maloo score at -1.

Patch Set 2:

its strange since the follow on patch actually passed.

Patch Set 2:

I'm not saying there is necessarily something wrong with this patch, but rather that resubmitting review-dne-zfs-part-4 is not useful. This is an optional test session that has a 100% failure in this configuration (see LU-10740 for details).

There appear to be a few other tests sessions failing - review-ldiskfs and review-dne-zfs-part-1 that need to be reviewed and resubmitted.

parents.subject: LU-10124 lnet: Correctly add peer MR value while importing

commit.subject: LU-8066 llite: move /proc/fs/lustre/llite/stats_track* to  sysfs
commit.message:
LU-8066 llite: move /proc/fs/lustre/llite/stats_track* to
 sysfs

Move stats_track_pid, stats_track_ppid and stats_track_gid files
from /proc/fs/lustre/llite/* to /sys/fs/lustre/llite/*/

This is a modified version of

Linux-commit: 62cf4b1315e86a1f373f77acf32a23d76428ba27

due to the large amount of changes to the OpenSFS/Intel branch.

Test-Parameters: trivial

Change-Id: I29dc2dd269f66e40a7d016ba366353ae2ca7fb51
Signed-off-by: Oleg Drokin <green@linuxhacker.ru>
